_comment: v2 run — fully on subscription quotas. Teacher Opus 4.7 via Claude Max CLI, Critic A gpt-5.5 via Codex CLI, Critic B gpt-5.4 via Codex CLI. Earlier run hit 'Credit balance is too low' because ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the env caused Claude Code to use API auth (with $0 balance) instead of Max OAuth — fixed by stripping that env var in the subprocess. Taxonomy (189 nodes / 162 leaves) reused via resume.
